subject: Language Arts
description: Use words and phrases and sensory details to convey experiences and events.
description_plain: Your child uses descriptive words and details that appeal to the senses to share experiences.

subject: Language Arts
description: Use transitional words first, next, last to order a sequence of events.
description_plain: Your child uses words like first, next, and last to show the order of events.

subject: Language Arts
description: List reasons to support an opinion (EE.W.4.3b).
description_plain: Your child can list reasons to explain their opinion.

subject: Language Arts
description: Write about a personal experience including two events in sequence (EE.W.4.3a).
description_plain: Your child can write about a personal experience and include two events in the order they happened.

subject: Language Arts
description: Write about events or personal experiences (EE.W.4.3).
description_plain: Your child can write stories about events or personal experiences.

subject: Language Arts
description: Write engaging, real or imagined narratives using descriptive details and dialogue to convey a sequence of related events.
description_plain: Your child writes interesting stories, real or made-up, using details and dialogue to show a series of connected events.

subject: Language Arts
description: Provide a concluding statement or sentence related to the information or explanation presented.
description_plain: Your child can write a closing sentence that relates to the information or explanation they gave.

subject: Language Arts
description: Use increasingly precise language and domain-specific vocabulary over time to inform about or explain a variety of topics.
description_plain: Your child uses clearer and more specific words, including special vocabulary, to explain different topics.

subject: Language Arts
description: Link ideas within categories of information, appropriately using words and phrases (e.g., another, for example, also, because).
description_plain: Your child connects ideas using words like 'another,' 'for example,' 'also,' and 'because.'

subject: Language Arts
description: List words, facts, or details related to the topic (EE.W.4.2b).
description_plain: Your child can list words, facts, or details about a topic.

subject: Language Arts
description: Organize relevant ideas and details to convey a central idea or prove a point.
description_plain: Your child organizes ideas and details to share a main idea or prove a point.

subject: Language Arts
description: Identify a text structure appropriate to purpose (e.g., sequence, chronology, description, explanation, comparison and contrast).
description_plain: Your child can recognize and use different ways to organize writing, like putting events in order or comparing things.

subject: Language Arts
description: Select a topic and write about it including related visual, tactual, or multimedia information as appropriate (EE.W.4.2a).
description_plain: Your child picks a topic and writes about it, including pictures or other media when it helps.

subject: Language Arts
description: Write informative/explanatory texts using text structures appropriate for the purpose and developed through facts, definitions, concrete details, precise language, and domain-specific vocabulary.
description_plain: Your child writes informative texts using facts, clear details, and special vocabulary organized in a way that fits the topic.

subject: Language Arts
description: Provide a concluding statement or sentence related to the opinion presented.
description_plain: Your child writes a closing sentence that relates to the opinion they shared.

subject: Language Arts
description: Create an organizational structure that lists opinion and reasons in a logical order.
description_plain: Your child arranges their opinion and reasons in a clear, logical order.

subject: Language Arts
description: List reasons to support the opinion (EE.W.4.1b).
description_plain: Your child lists reasons to support their opinion.

subject: Language Arts
description: Select a topic or text and write an opinion about it (EE.W.4.1a).
description_plain: Your child chooses a topic or text and writes their opinion about it.

subject: Language Arts
description: Write opinions about topics or text (EE.W.4.1).
description_plain: Your child writes opinions about different topics or texts.

subject: Language Arts
description: Write opinion pieces on topics or texts supporting a point of view with reasons and information. (CCSS: W.4.1)

subject: Language Arts
description: Use words acquired through conversations, being read to, and during shared reading activities including domain-specific words (EE.L.4.6).

subject: Language Arts
description: Demonstrate understanding of opposites (EE.L.4.5c).

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts
description: Demonstrate understanding of word relationships and use (EE.L.4.5).

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts
description: Demonstrate knowledge of word meanings (EE.L.4.4).

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts
description: Identify one or more reasons supporting a specific point in an informational text (EE.RI.4.8).

subject: Language Arts
description: Answer questions about information presented visually, orally, or quantitatively (EE.RI.4.7).

subject: Language Arts
description: Compare own experience with a written account of the experience (EE.RI.4.6).

subject: Language Arts
description: Identify elements that are characteristic of informational texts (EE.RI.4.5).

subject: Language Arts
description: Determine meanings of words in text (EE.RI.4.4).

subject: Language Arts
description: Identify the main idea of a text when it is explicitly stated (EE.RI.4.3).

subject: Language Arts
description: Identify the main idea of a text when it is explicitly stated (EE.RI.4.2).

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts

subject: Language Arts
